author: anon-13168fa2
content: Expanded Step 8 Submit for Adversarial Review in 01-talking-to-agents/05-first-build.md into eight sub-steps: 8a push everything, 8b open fresh conversation (builder/adversary must not share context), 8c adversary role prompt verbatim, 8d read before reacting (links to Forward), 8e triage into PROCESS.md Review 1 section with valid/invalid assessment, 8f fix and commit with descriptive messages, 8g optional second pass with exit signal guidance, 8h future live-reviewer format. Links to the new 00-foundations/06-the-guild.md chapter for context on why AI adversary is the default today.
